remarks.zh: 用于逐月动态计算贷款利息与本金明细。支持等额本息与等额本金两种模式切换，可精准查询任意特定期数的动态还款组成。参数说明：贷款本金为初始贷款总额；年利率支持输入5.5%或5.5；总期数为贷款总月数；当前期数为想查看的特定月份（如第1个月输入1）；还款模式通过列表选择等额本息或等额本金。
remarks.en: 用于逐月动态计算贷款利息与本金明细。支持等额本息与等额本金两种模式切换，可精准查询任意特定期数的动态还款组成。参数说明：贷款本金为初始贷款总额；年利率支持输入5.5%或5.5；总期数为贷款总月数；当前期数为想查看的特定月份（如第1个月输入1）；还款模式通过列表选择等额本息或等额本金。

remarks.zh: 本公式用于计算固定利率（Fix Rate）贷款的分期详情。适用场景包括固定利息的汽车贷款、商业设备贷或特定工程分期。输入说明：[总贷款]填写项目或物件总价；[首付]填写已付的Deposit金额；[贷款年限]填写整年数；[年利率]可直接输入百分比数字（如5.5）或小数（如0.055）。输出结果包含实际贷款额、总利息、总还款额及每月月供，数值均保留2位小数。
remarks.en: 本公式用于计算固定利率（Fix Rate）贷款的分期详情。适用场景包括固定利息的汽车贷款、商业设备贷或特定工程分期。输入说明：[总贷款]填写项目或物件总价；[首付]填写已付的Deposit金额；[贷款年限]填写整年数；[年利率]可直接输入百分比数字（如5.5）或小数（如0.055）。输出结果包含实际贷款额、总利息、总还款额及每月月供，数值均保留2位小数。

formulas.expression: {@D=[总贷款]-[首付]}{@I=if([年利率]>1,[年利率]/100,[年利率])}{@TI=@D*@I*[贷款年限]}{@TA=@D+@TI}{@M=@TA/([贷款年限]*12)}实际贷款额：{@D}&总利息：{round(@TI,2)}&总还款额：{round(@TA,2)}&每月还款额：{round(@M,2)}
formulas.author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体各部分的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]为整体尺寸，[板材厚度]为顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度]为背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุพื้นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm ván trên, dưới và cạnh, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày của vật liệu tấm nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal ng Pang-itaas, Pang-ilalim at Gilid na mga Board, [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal sa Llikod na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: လက်မ်ပရမရှိမှုကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်အမြှေးမရှိမှု [BoardThick] သီးတီးပျိုးမရှိမှုကိုတွက်ချက်သည် [BackBoardThick] (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាដែកថែបសំរាប់ឈើគ្រឿងទូ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាទំហំសរុប [BoardThick] គឺជាល្បាប់សាមញ្ញសម្រាប់កម្ពស់ [BackBoardThick] គឺជាល្បាប់ស្នៀត (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄຳນວນໄມ້ສໍາລັບຕູ້ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ [BoardThick] [BackBoardThick] (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体寸法、[BoardThick] は天板、底板、側板の材料厚み、[BackBoardThick] は背板の材料厚みです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상단, 하단 및 측면 보드의 재료 두께, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드의 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la Medida Total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas Superior, Inferior y Lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla Trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Brettgrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Bretter, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwand. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड आकारों की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, तल और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] पृष्ठभूमि बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] - это общие размеры, [BoardThick] - это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] - это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)

formulas.expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
formulas.author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.

formulas.expression: Frame Size: {[W]} x {[H]} & Glass Size: {[W]-50mm} x {[H]-50mm} & Seal Length: {([W]+[H])*2}
formulas.author: sheenhoong
